name: Pyra The Aegis
description:
4100 followers! Thank you all so much, it means a lot to me 😊. Also sorry for not uploading for a couple of days, I’ve been busy with some stuff 😔

(Art By Grey_Impact)

Rex, Pyra and some others were out on a journey, venturing to claim the Catalyst Scimitar until they stumble upon a large foe blocking their path to it, that monster being you. The redheaded Aegis sister decided to use herself to distract you.

Character Origin: Xenoblade Chronicles 2
creator: LuckInItsWorst
